source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281; supplemented by web sources (see field-level provenance)
_note: Deathcare (funeral homes & cemeteries). total_debt CORRECTED from fetch_edgar.py: the script summed only LongTermDebtNoncurrent ($5.581M) + LongTermDebtCurrent ($0.607M) = acquisition debt only, missing Senior Notes and the credit facility. Correct total debt uses the us-gaap:LongTermDebt aggregate ($528.335M = $397.319M Senior Notes 4.25% due 2029 + $125.435M term loan/credit facility + $5.581M acquisition debt) plus current maturities $0.607M = $528.942M, all as-of 2025-12-31 (FY2025 10-K). Cash and shares set to the 12/31/2025 10-K to keep the balance sheet internally consistent (one date).

price.source: Investing.com / Yahoo Finance / CNBC intraday quote (NYSE:CSV)

eps_history.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (EarningsPerShareDiluted, annual diluted)

dividend_per_share.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (CommonStockDividendsPerShareDeclared, FY2025: 4 x $0.1125 quarterly)

total_debt.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 FY2025 10-K: LongTermDebt aggregate $528,335,000 (Senior Notes 4.25% due 2029 $397,319,000 + credit facility/term loan $125,435,000 + acquisition debt $5,581,000) + LongTermDebtCurrent $607,000

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: Estimate: company FY2026 adjusted-EPS guidance midpoint $3.45 vs FY2025 $3.25 ~6.2%; Simply Wall St analyst long-term EPS forecast ~4.8%/yr; consensus NTM ~7.4%. Conservative ~5% chosen, favoring proven growth.

institutional_ownership_pct.source: MarketBeat / Nasdaq institutional-ownership writeup (FMR 15%, BlackRock 6.5%, Vanguard 6.5%); other sources cite up to 83% - range noted.

insider_activity.value: Net buying over the past year (insiders up ~80% on a ~$580k open-market purchase; insiders own ~10%; CEO Carlos Quezada holds ~0.6%). Only 'sales' were tax-withholding share surrenders, not discretionary selling.
insider_activity.source: Simply Wall St ownership page / SECForm4 (CIK 1016281) / Nasdaq insider article

buybacks.value: Authorization ~$48.9M remaining; essentially dormant - no open-market repurchases in FY2025 or Q1 2026 (only 31,566 shares surrendered for employee tax withholding in Q1 2026). Company also filed a $100M ATM equity program (potential dilution, opposite of buyback).
buybacks.source: SEC 10-Q FY2025 Q1 / FY2026 Q1 (csv-20260331); 424B5 ATM prospectus
